title: This 'Real Housewives' star says she could 'throw down' in Congress
shortDescription: "The TSA lines are ridiculous," the "Beverly Hills" star told USA TODAY, lamenting the monthlong shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security.

title: 'Blame the Democrats.' Republicans share videos from Atlanta airport
shortDescription: National Republicans are sharing videos from inside the Atlanta airport blaming the partial government shutdown on Democrats. Long lines continue.

title: See Rep. Summer Lee’s time in Congress
shortDescription: Summer Lee is a Democratic U.S. House member for Pennsylvania’s 12th District, covering parts of Pittsburgh and Allegheny County elected in 2022.

title: What was that sound at the Capitol? DHS nominee must be around the corner
shortDescription: The Oklahoma Republican has long had an affinity for a pink rubber bouncy ball. "I don't know why," he once told a tour group.

title: What did Trump say about Joe Kent, the official who resigned over Iran?
shortDescription: Head of the U.S. National Counterterrorism Center Joe Kent resigned over the war in Iran. President Donald Trump called him 'weak on security.'

title: Markwayne Mullin faces Senate hearing for DHS leadership
shortDescription: A look at key moments as Markwayne Mullin appears before the Senate for his Homeland Security confirmation hearing.

title: How Markwayne Mullin built his wealth while serving in Congress
shortDescription: Mullin sold a Stilwell property to the Cherokee Nation in 2024 for $1.5 million. The purchase price was nearly twice the assessed value.

title: Trump DHS pick says he regrets disparaging Alex Pretti after shooting
shortDescription: Trump named Sen. Markwayne Mullin to head the Department of Homeland Security after firing Kristi Noem amid his contentious immigration crackdown.

title: See primary election results for key Illinois races
shortDescription: Here's how the Illinois House and Senate races are stacking up this midterm cycle.

title: 'Dear leader': Illinois gov. blasts Trump in victory speech
shortDescription: Juliana Stratton is likely to become the 6th Black woman senator in U.S. history after winning her primary with an anti-Trump message.

title: White House offers concessions to Dems in bid to end DHS shutdown
shortDescription: The Trump administration has offered concessions to Democrats to end the DHS shutdown. But they all come with caveats.

title: The made-for-TV primary elections in Illinois and what they mean
shortDescription: It is Election Day in Illinois, and a number of key races could help forecast political trends across the country later this year and ahead of 2028.

title: Trump admin sued for ending 'Democrat projects,' subway expansion aid
shortDescription: The Second Avenue Subway expansion has been planned for a century. Federal officials abruptly withheld funds on what Trump called "Democrat projects."

title: Why does Trump want Cuba amid power outages, oil blockades?
shortDescription: Trump has recently increased pressure on the island nation of Cuba, adding March 17 Washington would be doing "something with Cuba" soon.

title: Trump's Iran war dilemma hinges on how to end it
shortDescription: USA TODAY Washington Bureau Chief Susan Page analyzes the lessons President Donald Trump may have learned from his war on Iran.

title: States sue Trump administration over fair housing protections
shortDescription: California and 14 other states have filed a lawsuit against the Trump administration over new guidelines issued to housing agencies nationwide.
